description: Style NoteGlamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. A classic dress with styling details to spurce up the entire look, this one is definitely one of the must haves. Pair it with high heeled black closed pump shoes and accesorise subtly for an elegant look. Product DetailsOrange printed dress with draped V-neckline, short sleeves, tucks on the front and fabric tie- up detail below the bust Material and Care100% viscose/rayonMachine wash coldDry away from direct sunlightWash with like coloursIron back to shapeSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 8
